source: OpenCVE + NVD (NVD API blocked at proxy)
data_quality_note: cve_watch.py failed due to 403 tunnel block on services.nvd.nist.gov; brief built from OpenCVE vendor pages and live web search.

entries_in_window.description: LDAP filter injection in Airflow FAB Auth Manager; unauthenticated attacker can exfiltrate directory data or bypass auth.
ComputeEngineSSHHook disables SSH host-key verification by default; MITM between Airflow worker and GCE VM.
Groovy class static-initializer sandbox escape via Implementations entitlements (admin).
Incomplete fix for <specific-cve-id> allows bypass of EncryptInterceptor on Tomcat 11.0.20 / 10.1.53 / 9.0.116 cluster comms.
